name: Hummus Mezze Platter
tagline: Whipped chickpea hummus with za'atar, olive oil, warm pita
highlight: Restaurant-smooth at home — baking soda is the cheat

hero.alt: Hummus swirl with olive oil, za'atar, and pita
hero.caption: hummus — silky and warm

healthFacts: Tahini brings calcium that pairs with chickpea protein for a complete bite.
Baking soda dissolves chickpea skins for restaurant-smooth texture.

steps.title: Boil with baking soda
steps.detail: Drain chickpeas. Simmer in fresh water with baking soda 8 min — skins will loosen and rise. Skim them off, drain.
steps.tip: Skinless chickpeas blend twice as smooth.

steps.title: Whip tahini base
steps.detail: Process tahini, lemon, garlic, salt for 1 min until pale and thick. Slowly drip in ice water until creamy and ribboning.
steps.tip: Tahini-lemon-water emulsion comes first — it's a sauce in itself.

steps.title: Add chickpeas and blend long
steps.detail: Add hot chickpeas (still warm = silkier). Blend 4 minutes solid, scraping down as needed.
steps.tip: If you're blending under 3 min, it's not done. Keep going.

steps.title: Plate with swoops
steps.detail: Spoon onto a plate; use the back of a spoon to swirl a well in the center. Pool olive oil; sprinkle za'atar. Warm pita alongside.
steps.tip: Warm pita: 30 sec per side in a dry skillet, or 5 min in 350°F oven.

media.alt: Hummus plate with za'atar and pita
media.caption: plate with swoops
